texas_v10_rule_basis: Preserve noindex until all critical families are verified
District-grade routing must use direct local or district-owned evidence, not generic or statewide fallback
Legacy/inventory-only evidence does not satisfy California-grade completeness

final_blockers.evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 bounded live Oregon county-local checks. The old `https://dhhs.oregon.gov/locations` host now fails DNS resolution, but the live successor root `https://www.oregon.gov/odhs/pages/office-finder.aspx` returns HTTP 200 only as a generic `Find an Office` page with no preserved county list or office extract in static HTML. A bounded DB check also shows current Oregon county-office rows split between 61 DOI-backed planning rows and only 3 dead `dhhs.oregon.gov/locations` rows. No reviewed county-grade office contract is preserved on disk.
